title: Floral Ethiopian Flour Crumble
description: A chewy and nostalgic dish featuring a blend of gluten-free flour mixed with toasted spices for a floral flavor profile, perfect as a breakfast or snack option.

ingredients.name: 1/2 teaspoon ground cardamom
ingredients.notes: for a floral aroma and flavor

ingredients.name: 1/4 teaspoon ground ginger
ingredients.notes: to enhance the nutty taste and spice up the dish

ingredients.name: 3 cups almond milk or any non-dairy milk of choice

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour blend, cardamom, ginger, and salt.
Gradually add in softened butter, stirring until well combined. The mixture should be crumbly when done.
Add honey or maple syrup followed by the almond milk, stir to incorporate evenly. Squeeze in lemon juice just before adding it for best flavor retention.
Transfer dough into a greased muffin tin or small ramekins lined with baking paper. Ensure each crumble is evenly spaced.
Bake for 20-25 minutes until golden brown and crispy on the outside.
Let cool slightly, then serve warm for an extra flavor boost.
